overall.description: A foggy morning walk along the wooden docks of Saint Denis harbor in Red Dead Redemption 2. The player moves past the Harbor Master building, NPCs in period clothing, and moored ships, eventually walking alongside a large steamship named ASH.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock plaza with harbor master building

events.description: passes by wooden cargo carts on the left side of the dock

agents.ego_description: walking through the open dock plaza toward the Saint Denis harbor master building

notable_agents.action: man in white coat and hat standing near wooden cart
man in vest and hat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with clock and SAINT DENIS signage on the facade
vintage wooden wagons with large spoked wheels
stacked shipping crates and barrels along the dock edge
tall cast iron lamp posts with glass enclosures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy wooden dock plaza with the Saint Denis Harbor Master building visible ahead. The player walks forward past vintage wooden cargo carts and crates, approaching NPCs standing near the building entrance. The atmosphere is misty with warm golden morning light diffusing through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with moored sailing vessels

events.description: turns left to follow the waterfront edge alongside the water
moves from building front to open waterfront with visible water and moored ships

agents.ego_description: turning left along the dock edge and walking past people sitting on benches overlooking the water

notable_agents.action: woman in red and white dress with feathered hat sitting on wooden bench
man in red coat and top hat standing and smoking near the railing

entered.detail: tall-masted wooden ships anchored in the foggy water
simple wooden slatted benches for dock workers and visitors
wooden tables with fish remains and cleaning tools
thick wooden pilings along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The player turns left to follow the waterfront promenade, revealing moored sailing ships in the foggy water to the left. The Harbor Master building recedes to the right while people sit on benches along the dock edge. Fish cleaning tables and wooden posts line the path as the scene opens up to the harbor view.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under dock structure alongside steamship

events.description: enters shadow under the wooden support structure of the building
passes close to the large steamship hull on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking under the dock structure past people sitting and reading near the water's edge

notable_agents.action: man in grey suit sitting on bench reading a newspaper
man in red coat leaning on railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: large grey steamship with white upper structure and multiple decks
thick white-painted wooden trusses and support pillars
painted letters ASH visible on the ship hull
distant factory smokestacks visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Moving under the shadow of the dock structure, the player walks alongside a massive steamship named ASH. The lighting shifts to a darker, mixed tone under the wooden beams. People sit on benches reading newspapers while industrial smokestacks loom in the foggy background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dock passage alongside large steamship hull

events.description: camera passes extremely close to ship hull which fills the left side of frame

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the steamship hull examining the portholes and riveted metal structure

entered.detail: round metal-rimmed portholes on the grey steel hull
metal railings on the upper deck of the steamship
distant industrial buildings and smokestacks across the harbor

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow passage between the dock building and the massive steamship hull. The camera passes close to the ship's portholes and riveted steel plates, with the name ASH visible. The area is empty of people, with industrial buildings visible through the fog in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty harbor plaza that gradually narrows into a shadowed industrial corridor alongside a massive ship. It begins on a foggy wooden dock, moving past vintage cargo carts and crates toward the Saint Denis Harbor Master building under a warm, diffused morning light. As the camera turns left to follow the waterfront promenade, the scene opens up to reveal moored sailing ships and people resting on benches, with fish cleaning tables lining the path. The lighting then shifts to a darker, mixed tone as the camera moves under the shadow of the dock structure, passing by readers of newspapers and looming industrial smokestacks. Finally, the perspective tightens into a narrow passage between the dock building and the riveted steel hull of the steamship ASH, moving past its portholes toward distant industrial buildings shrouded in fog.
